header.title: Member Pages
header.lead: Members manage their giving, pledge, and directory through Breeze, our secure church management system.

intro: Click Member Log In to access your account. New to Breeze or need help? Contact the office at info@uuwellesley.org.

cards.title: Member Log In
cards.text: Access your member account, profile, and the directory.

cards.title: Member Directory
cards.text: Find contact information for fellow members (sign-in required).

cards.title: Give
cards.text: Make a one-time or recurring gift by credit card or ACH.

cards.title: Pledge
cards.text: Make or pay your annual pledge commitment.
